mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : LessonOperateDAO.count 설 명 : 수업운영 카운트 */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID , (SELECT SMSTRNM FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE CRS_SMSTR_ID = TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID) AS SMSTRNM , TLCC.CRS_ID , TLCC.SBJCT_ID , TLCC.CRS_ID , (SELECT ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ORGNM , TLCC.SBJCT_ID , CONCAT(TLCC.SBJCTNM, ' ( ', TLCC.DVCLAS_NO, '반 ) ') AS SBJCTNM , TLCC.DEPT_CD , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(#{orgId}, TLCC.DEPT_CD) AS DEPTNM , FN_GET_USER_NM((SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y')) AS MAJOR_USER_NM , FN_GET_USER_ID((SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y')) AS MAJOR_USER_ID , FN_GET_USER_NM((SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND PROF_TYCD = 'ASSISTANT' AND RPRSYN = 'N' LIMIT 1)) AS MINOR_USER_NM , FN_GET_USER_ID((SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND PROF_TYCD = 'ASSISTANT' AND RPRSYN = 'N' LIMIT 1 )) AS MINOR_USER_ID , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N') STD_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AS QNA_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT A.ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS QNA_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND BBS_ID IN (SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN WHERE RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AND ATCL_ID NOT IN ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS QNA_NO_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AS SECRET_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT A.ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS SECRET_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND BBS_ID IN (SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN WHERE RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND ATCL_ID NOT IN ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS SECRET_NO_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_SUBMIT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD IS NULL) AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
/* EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN */ AND A.EXT_SEND_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)) AS ASMNT_NO_SUBMIT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND J.EVLYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
/*PRD_AFTR_WRTYN*/ AND A.EXTD_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)) AS FORUM_NO_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND J.EVLYN = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.EDTTM IS NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
) AS QUIZ_NO_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EVLYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND ( A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' OR A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' ) AND ( A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL OR A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID != '' ) AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND J.ASMT_ID = C.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_ASMNT_SUBMT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND J.DSCS_ID = C.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_FORUM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_EXAM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(A.EXAM_SDTTM, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'),'%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS MIDDLE_START_DTTM , (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(A.EXAM_EDTTM, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'),'%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS MIDDLE_END_DTTM , (SELECT A.TKEXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS MIDDLE_EXAM_STARE_TM , (SELECT CASE WHEN A.EXAMPPR_OYN = 'Y' THEN '시험지공개' ELSE '시험지미공개' END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS MIDDLE_GRADE_VIEW_NM , (SELECT CASE WHEN A.MRK_OYN = 'Y' THEN '성적공개' ELSE '성적미공개' END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS MIDDLE_SCORE_OPEN_NM , (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(A.EXAM_SDTTM, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'),'%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS LAST_START_DTTM , (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(A.EXAM_EDTTM, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'),'%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS LAST_END_DTTM , (SELECT TKEXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS LAST_EXAM_STARE_TM , (SELECT CASE WHEN A.EXAMPPR_OYN = 'Y' THEN '시험지공개' ELSE '시험지미공개' END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS LAST_GRADE_VIEW_NM , (SELECT CASE WHEN A.MRK_OYN = 'Y' THEN '성적공개' ELSE '성적미공개' END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS LAST_SCORE_OPEN_NM , TLCC.RGTR_ID , TLCC.FRST_INQ_DTTM , TLCC.MDFR_ID , TLCC.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT TLCC LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CRE_CRS_EVAL TLCCE ON TLCC.SBJCT_ID = TLCCE.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN TLTCCR ON TLCC.SBJCT_ID = TLTCCR.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_CRS TLC ON TLCC.CRS_ID = TLC.CRS_ID AND TLC.DELYN = 'N' AND TLC.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE 1 = 1 AND TLCC.DELYN = 'N'
AND TLC.SBJCT_TYCD IN
#{item}
AND TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} AND TLCC.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
AND ( LOWER(TLCC.SBJCTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(TLCC.SBJCT_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(FN_GET_USER_NM((SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y'))) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
) X

/* SQL ID : LessonOperateDAO.listLoginLecturePageing 설 명 :로그인 경과 개설과목 목록 */
SELECT X.LINE_NO , X.CRS_ID , X.SBJCT_ID , X.SBJCT_ID , X.CRS_ID , X.CRS_SMSTR_ID , X.SMSTRNM , X.ORGNM , X.SBJCTNM , X.MAJOR_USER_NM , X.DEPT_CD , X.DEPTNM , X.STD_CNT , X.SCORE_EVAL_GBN , X.SCORE_GRANT_GBN , X.QNA_ANS_CNT , X.QNA_NO_ANS_CNT , X.QNA_CNT , X.LECTURE_COMMENTS , IFNULL(X.SECRET_ANS_CNT,0) , X.SECRET_NO_ANS_CNT , X.SECRET_CNT , X.ASMNT_EVAL_CNT , X.ASMNT_SUBMIT_CNT , X.ASMNT_NO_SUBMIT_CNT , X.QUIZ_EVAL_CNT , X.QUIZ_ANS_CNT , X.QUIZ_NO_ANS_CNT , X.FORUM_EVAL_CNT , X.FORUM_ANS_CNT , X.FORUM_NO_ANS_CNT , X.ALTASK_ASMNT_SUBMT_CNT , X.ALTASK_FORUM_ANS_CNT , X.ALTASK_EXAM_ANS_CNT , X.ALTASK_CNT , X.RGTR_ID , X.FRST_INQ_DTTM , X.MDFR_ID , X.MOD_DTTM FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TLCC.SBJCT_ID DESC) AS LINE_NO , TLCC.CRS_ID , TLCC.SBJCT_ID , TLCC.SBJCT_ID, TLCC.CRS_ID , TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID , (SELECT SMSTRNM FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE CRS_SMSTR_ID = TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID) AS SMSTRNM , (SELECT ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ORGNM , CONCAT(TLCC.SBJCTNM, ' ( ', TLCC.DVCLAS_NO, '반 ) ') AS SBJCTNM , TLCC.DEPT_CD , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(#{orgId}, TLCC.DEPT_CD) AS DEPTNM , FN_GET_USER_NM((SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y')) AS MAJOR_USER_NM , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N') STD_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT A.ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS QNA_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND BBS_ID IN (SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN WHERE RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AND ATCL_ID NOT IN ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS QNA_NO_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AS QNA_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID IN ('FREE', 'PHOTO','TEAM') AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AS LECTURE_COMMENTS , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT A.ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS SECRET_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND BBS_ID IN (SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN WHERE RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND ATCL_ID NOT IN ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS SECRET_NO_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AS SECRET_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND J.EVLYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_SUBMIT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD IS NULL) AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
/* EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN AND A.EXT_SEND_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)*/) AS ASMNT_NO_SUBMIT_CNT /* , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_CNT */ , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EVLYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.EDTTM IS NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
) AS QUIZ_NO_ANS_CNT /* , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_CNT */ , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND J.EVLYN = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
/*PRD_AFTR_WRTYN AND A.EXTD_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)*/) AS FORUM_NO_ANS_CNT /* , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_CNT */ , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND J.ASMT_ID = C.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_ASMNT_SUBMT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND J.DSCS_ID = C.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_FORUM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_EXAM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND ( A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' OR A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' ) AND ( A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL OR A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID != '' ) AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_CNT , TLCCSG.SCORE_EVAL_GBN , TLCCSG.SCORE_GRANT_GBN , TLCC.RGTR_ID , TLCC.FRST_INQ_DTTM , TLCC.MDFR_ID , TLCC.MOD_DTTM FROM SBJCT_PROF TLCCTR INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT TLCC ON TLCCTR.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND TLCC.DELYN = 'N' AND TLCC.USEYN = 'Y' AND TLCCTR.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_LMS_CRE_CRS_SCORE_GBN TLCCSG ON TLCCSG.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN TLTCCR ON TLCC.SBJCT_ID = TLTCCR.SBJCT_ID
AND TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} AND TLCC.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
AND ( LOWER(TLCC.SBJCTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(TLCC.SBJCT_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(FN_GET_USER_NM((SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y'))) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
ORDER BY TLCC.SBJCT_ID ) X

/* SQL ID : LessonOperateDAO.countLoginLecture 설 명 : 로그인 경과 개설과목 카운트 */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TLCC.SBJCT_ID DESC) AS LINE_NO , TLCC.CRS_ID , TLCC.SBJCT_ID , TLCC.SBJCT_ID, TLCC.CRS_ID , TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID , (SELECT SMSTRNM FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE CRS_SMSTR_ID = TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID) AS SMSTRNM , (SELECT ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ORGNM , CONCAT(TLCC.SBJCTNM, ' ( ', TLCC.DVCLAS_NO, '반 ) ') AS SBJCTNM , TLCC.SBJCT_ENNM , TLCC.DEPT_CD , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(#{orgId}, TLCC.DEPT_CD) AS DEPTNM , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N') STD_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT A.ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS QNA_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND BBS_ID IN (SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN WHERE RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND ATCL_ID NOT IN ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS QNA_NO_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'QNA' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AS QNA_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID IN ('FREE', 'PHOTO','TEAM') AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AS LECTURE_COMMENTS , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT A.ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS SECRET_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND BBS_ID IN (SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN WHERE RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND ATCL_ID NOT IN ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.FRST_INQ_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AND DELYN = 'N') AS SECRET_NO_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A, TB_LMS_BBS B, TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN C WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND B.BBS_ID = 'SECRET' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.RLTN_REF_CD = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND C.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE') AS SECRET_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND J.EVLYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_SUBMIT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD IS NULL) AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.SEND_END_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
/* EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN AND A.EXT_SEND_DTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)*/) AS ASMNT_NO_SUBMIT_CNT /* , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ASMNT_CNT */ , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EVLYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.EDTTM IS NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.EXAM_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
) AS QUIZ_NO_ANS_CNT /* , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS QUIZ_CNT */ , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND J.EVLYN = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_EVAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -10 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -30 DAY)
AND A.DSCS_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
/*PRD_AFTR_WRTYN AND A.EXTD_EDTTM < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)*/) AS FORUM_NO_ANS_CNT /* , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS FORUM_CNT */ , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN J, TB_LMS_ASMT A, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C WHERE J.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND J.ASMT_ID = C.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND (J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' OR J.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE') AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_ASMNT_SUBMT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP J, TB_LMS_DSCS A, TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C WHERE J.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND J.DSCS_ID = C.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = J.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AND A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_FORUM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE S, TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND S.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND S.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND S.EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_EXAM_ANS_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A, TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B WHERE A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND ( A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' OR A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' ) AND ( A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL OR A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID != '' ) AND B.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS ALTASK_CNT , TLCCSG.SCORE_EVAL_GBN , TLCCSG.SCORE_GRANT_GBN , TLCC.RGTR_ID , TLCC.FRST_INQ_DTTM , TLCC.MDFR_ID , TLCC.MOD_DTTM FROM SBJCT_PROF TLCCTR INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT TLCC ON TLCCTR.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND TLCC.DELYN = 'N' AND TLCC.USEYN = 'Y' AND TLCCTR.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_LMS_CRE_CRS_SCORE_GBN TLCCSG ON TLCCSG.SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN TLTCCR ON TLCC.SBJCT_ID = TLTCCR.SBJCT_ID
AND TLTCCR.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} AND TLCC.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
AND ( LOWER(TLCC.SBJCTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(TLCC.SBJCT_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(FN_GET_USER_NM((SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = TLCC.SBJCT_ID AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND RPRSYN = 'Y'))) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
ORDER BY TLCC.SBJCT_ID ) X
